title: Attendance Explicit Clock In Command
description: Imperative request to explicitly clock a worker in on a target timekeeping system. Orwell can consume this command without performing state inference.

clock_system.description: Target timekeeping integration or system name, for example 'orwell'.

principal.description: Logical worker or account identifier that should be clocked in.

reason.description: Optional operator-visible reason for the explicit clock-in request.

requested_at.description: Optional caller timestamp representing when the clock-in was requested.
